meta.title: Lessons from the CISA COVID Task Force
meta.description:
Josh Corman graciously accepted the call from the US Government to serve on the important and high pressure US Government CISA COVID Task Force. Josh tells some stories and provides lessons learned from the experience.

While there is a lot of talk on healthcare and the challenges and close calls with developing and delivering the vaccine, Josh also touches on other CI sectors and the USG sector based approach.

And yes, people have died as a result of cyber attacks on hospitals.
